Container.Name: mxlrcgo-svc
Container.Overview: Fetch synced lyrics from Musixmatch and save them as .lrc files for music libraries.
Container.Description: mxlrcgo-svc fetches synced lyrics from the Musixmatch API, writes .lrc files, and can run as a small HTTP service for Lidarr webhook-driven lyric fetching.

Config.Name: Appdata
Config.Description: Stores configuration and the SQLite database.

Config.Name: Media Library
Config.Description: Your media parent, mapped to /data inside the container following the TRaSH Guides single-mount convention. Register libraries under it (for example /data/media/music) with 'mxlrcgo-svc library add'. For multiple shares, add one more Path mapping per share beneath /data/media.

Config.Name: Musixmatch Token
Config.Description: Musixmatch API token used to fetch lyrics.

Config.Name: Webhook API Key
Config.Description: API key accepted by webhook endpoints. Generate one with mxlrcgo-svc keys create --scope webhook.

Config.Name: PUID
Config.Description: User ID for file permissions. Default 99 maps to nobody on Unraid.

Config.Name: PGID
Config.Description: Group ID for file permissions. Default 100 maps to users on Unraid.

Config.Name: Server Address
Config.Description: HTTP listen address inside the container.

Config.Name: Enable Web UI
Config.Description: Enable the browser UI on the serve listener (overrides web_ui_enabled in config.toml).

Config.Name: Output Directory
Config.Description: Fallback directory for generated lyric files from webhook jobs that resolve via metadata. Lyrics for scanned libraries are written next to the audio file regardless of this value.

Config.Name: API Cooldown
Config.Description: Cooldown between Musixmatch API requests in seconds.

Config.Name: Scan Interval
Config.Description: Library scan interval in seconds. 0 scans once without repeating. Safe to raise when the filesystem watcher is enabled.

Config.Name: Work Interval
Config.Description: Worker poll interval in seconds. 0 falls back to the API cooldown (15s floor).

Config.Name: Watcher Enabled
Config.Description: Enable the optional low-latency filesystem watcher. Best-effort on bind mounts/NFS/SMB; the periodic scan remains the source of truth.

Config.Name: Watcher Debounce (ms)
Config.Description: Quiet period in milliseconds after the last filesystem event before a directory is scanned. Coalesces tagger write storms.

Config.Name: Watcher Max Dirs
Config.Description: Safety cap on the number of directories the watcher will register. Startup fails loudly if the configured roots exceed it.
